response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong recent alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS — plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and demonstrated craftsmanship exceed the seniority bar; gaps are limited to specific framework names rather than capabilities.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience at scale
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, authored test runners, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin and Python absent from skills (Java present but dated)
Significant time in niche DLang ecosystem may mean some modern-stack ramp-up
